ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cryptocurrencies" (
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cryptocurrency */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the cryptocurrency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the cryptocurrency (e.g., BTC, ETH) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cryptocurrency */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the cryptocurrency */,
  "circulating_supply" REAL /* Number of coins currently circulating */,
  "total_supply" REAL /* Total number of coins that will ever exist */,
  "max_supply" REAL /* Maximum number of coins that will ever be in circulation */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Date the cryptocurrency was launched */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the cryptocurrency */,
  "whitepaper" TEXT /* URL to the whitepaper of the cryptocurrency */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the logo of the cryptocurrency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., Annual Hash Growth, Block Height) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric (e.g., percentage, number) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the metric (e.g., integer, float) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the metric (e.g., Performance, Security, Usage) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the metric is collected (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the metric data (e.g., blockchain, API, manual entry) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency being tracked */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric being tracked */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the data point was recorded */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric at the given date */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source where the data point was collected from */,
  "confidence_level" INTEGER /* Measure of the reliability or confidence in the data point */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being assigned the permission */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency being accessed */,
  "read" INTEGER /* Whether the user has read access */,
  "write" INTEGER /* Whether the user has write access */,
  "execute" INTEGER /* Whether the user has execute access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data warehouse */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the data warehouse */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the data warehouse */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the data warehouse (e.g., on-premises, cloud) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data warehouse (e.g., active, maintenance) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data warehouse was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data warehouse was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouse_data" (
  "warehouse_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse data point */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data warehouse storing the data */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency being stored */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the data point was recorded */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric at the given date */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source where the data point was collected from */,
  "confidence_level" INTEGER /* Measure of the reliability or confidence in the data point */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warehouse_data_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warehouse_data_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES data_warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "query" TEXT /* Query used to generate the report */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the report (e.g., Performance, Security, Usage) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the report is generated (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_data" (
  "report_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report data point */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report generating the data */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the data point was recorded */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric at the given date */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source where the data point was collected from */,
  "confidence_level" INTEGER /* Measure of the reliability or confidence in the data point */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_data_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message being sent to the user */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., unread, read) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
